info.title: Tech Risk & Compliance - Enterprise Policy Management
info.description: The Enterprise Policy Management APIs are used to integrate external systems and streamline the flow of data with Enterprise Policy Management in the OneTrust platform.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Document Attachments
tags.description: The Document Attachments APIs are used to manage attachments on document objects such as policies, standards, procedures, and privacy notices.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: The Documents APIs are used to manage document objects such as policies, standards, procedures, and privacy notices.

post.description: Use this API to create a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve a list of policies, standards, procedures, or privacy notices by the specified compliance document type.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of results per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The sort criteria that dictates the order of the results.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve details for the specified policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice. This value is obtained using the [Get List of Documents API](/onetrust/reference/getlatestpolicies).

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve the last published version of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice by the specified date.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice. This value is obtained using the [Get List of Documents API](/onetrust/reference/getlatestpolicies).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date and time on which the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice was published.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

post.description: Use this API to add attachments to a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice. Attachments can include supporting files or related resources.

parameters.name: policyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice. This value is obtained using the [Get List of Documents API](/onetrust/reference/getlatestpolicies).

201.description: Documents successfully added to the policy

429.description:
Too Many Requests.

post.description: Use this API to create a new version of a policy, standard, or procedure.

parameters.name: policyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, or procedure. This value is obtained using the [Get List of Documents API](/onetrust/reference/getlatestpolicies).

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

policyContentType.description: The method used to build the policy, standard, or procedure.

attachmentId.description: The unique identifier of the file attached to the policy, standard, or procedure. This value is obtained using the [Upload File API](/onetrust/reference/fileupload).

publishVersionType.description: The version type of the policy, standard, or procedure.

versionSequence.description: The version number of the policy, standard, or procedure. The number should be incremented to the next major or minor version based on the `publishVersionType` parameter.

status.description: The publish status for the version of the policy, standard, or procedure.

descriptionOfChanges.description: The description of changes made to the policy, standard, or procedure for the version.

documentId.description: The unique identifier of the file attached to the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice. This value is obtained using the [Upload File API](/onetrust/reference/fileupload).

fileDescription.example: Supporting documentation for data privacy compliance

documentLink.description: The URL link of the attachment.

id.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice approver. This value is obtained using the [Get List of Users API](/onetrust/reference/getusers).

The unique identifier of the organization responsible for the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.. This value is obtained using the [Get List of Organizations API](/onetrust/reference/organizationtreestructureusingget).

name.description: The name of the organization responsible for the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

id.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice owner. This value is obtained using the [Get List of Users API](/onetrust/reference/getusers).

orgGroup.description: The details of the organization responsible for the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

name.description: The name of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

description.description: The description of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

effectiveDate.description: The date on which the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice takes effect.

expirationDate.description: The date on which the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice expires.

approvers.description: The details of the user(s) responsible for approving all drafts and changes made to the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

owners.description: The details of the user(s) responsible for creating and updating the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

defaultLanguageCode.description: The default language of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

id.description: The unique identifier of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice approver.

name.description: The name of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice approver.

email.description: The email address of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice approver.

name.description: The name of the organization responsible for the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

id.description: The unique identifier of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice owner.

name.description: The name of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice owner.

email.description: The email address of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice owner.

guid.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

description.description: The description of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

owners.description: The details of the user(s) responsible for creating and updating the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

approvers.description: The details of the user(s) responsible for approving all drafts and changes made to the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

effectiveDate.description: The date on which the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice takes effect.

expirationDate.description: The date on which the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice expires.

id.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

defaultLanguageCode.description:
The default language of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

For more information, see [Supported Languages and HTML Language Codes.](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/supported-languages-and-html-language-codes-1)

versions.description: The details of the versions of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

id.description: The unique identifier for a specific version of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

attachmentId.description: The unique identifier of a file attached to a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

descriptionOfChanges.description: The description of changes made to a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice for a version.

publishedDate.description: The date and time on which a version of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice was published.

createdDate.description: The date and time on which a version of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice was created.

versionStatus.description: The status of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice version.

policyContentType.description: The method used to build a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

sections.description: The sections of a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

majorVersion.description: The number of major versions created for a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

minorVersion.description: The number of minor versions created for a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

name.description: The name of a section within a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

description.description: The description of a section within a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

content.description: The content of a section within a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

sectionType.description: The type of section within a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

order.description: The numerical order in which a section appears within a policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

guid.description: The unique identifier of the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

organizationName.description: The name of the organization responsible for the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice.

effectiveDate.description: The date on which the policy, standard, procedure, or privacy notice takes effect.
